page_content:
## 2. Dr. Patrick Horn (The Alpha Fold Catalyst)  
**Focus:** Nostalgic tone; connecting Biochemistry to AI.  
**Subject:** Medical School LOR Request: Arian Moridani (Biochemistry I)  
Hey Dr. Horn,  
I hope you're doing well—and still having your occasional Dr. Pepper!  
I wanted to reach out and share how much your **Biochemistry I** class changed my trajectory. The **Alpha Fold** project, in particular, sparked my interest in how AI can predict complex biological structures with such precision. That moment truly stuck with me.  
I am finishing my **M.S. in Computer Science (Machine Learning)** at Georgia Tech this summer and am now applying to medical school. My goal is to become a physician-engineer who can bring data-driven tools directly into clinical settings. I’d love for your letter to reflect that journey and how your class shaped my curiosity about the intersection of biology and AI.  
To keep things simple, I’m using **Interfolio** so all applications receive one upload from you. I’ve attached my **updated CV** and **project summaries** for your reference.  
Thanks again for being such a great mentor; your influence still shows up in my work today.  
Best regards,  
Arian Moridani
arianmoridani@my.unt.edu
arian.moridani@outlook.com  
---
